description: Baseline fixture: the current github_actions_hardening checklist has no rule targeting self-hosted-runner risk on its own, so a hardened workflow that happens to use `runs-on: self-hosted` should clear every existing pass with zero findings. The fixture exists (a) as a control to confirm the scanner does not regress and start emitting spurious self-hosted findings, and (b) as a placeholder for the day a self-hosted-runner rule is added.
